overview.description: The FT Vest Nasdaq-100 Moderate Buffer ETF - August (QMAG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on QQQ ETF over a specific holding period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. QMAG was launched on Aug 16, 2024 and is issued by First Trust.
